---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    container-fluid: true
---
```{=html}
<div class="contact-page">
  <div class="contact-header">
    <h1 class="contact-title">Get in Touch</h1>
    <p class="contact-subtitle">
      Whether you want to propose a new living meta-analysis, update an existing project,
      or share feedback, we are here to help.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-forms-container">
    <!-- Tab Navigation with icons and descriptions -->
    <nav class="contact-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Contact form options">
      <button class="contact-tab active" role="tab" aria-selected="true"
              aria-controls="propose-panel" id="tab-propose" data-form="propose">
        <svg class="contact-tab-icon" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15"/>
        </svg>
        <span class="contact-tab-label">Propose Project</span>
        <span class="contact-tab-desc">Submit a new living meta-analysis</span>
      </button>

      <button class="contact-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false"
              aria-controls="update-panel" id="tab-update" data-form="update" tabindex="-1">
        <svg class="contact-tab-icon" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                d="M16.023 9.348h4.992v-.001M2.985 19.644v-4.992m0 0h4.992m-4.993 0l3.181 3.183a8.25 8.25 0 0013.803-3.7M4.031 9.865a8.25 8.25 0 0113.803-3.7l3.181 3.182"/>
        </svg>
        <span class="contact-tab-label">Update Project</span>
        <span class="contact-tab-desc">Submit changes to an existing project</span>
      </button>

      <button class="contact-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false"
              aria-controls="feedback-panel" id="tab-feedback" data-form="feedback" tabindex="-1">
        <svg class="contact-tab-icon" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                d="M8.625 9.75a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0zm0 0H8.25m4.125 0a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0zm0 0H12m4.125 0a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0zm0 0h-.375m-13.5 3.01c0 1.6 1.123 2.994 2.707 3.227 1.087.16 2.185.283 3.293.369V21l4.184-4.183a1.14 1.14 0 01.778-.332 48.294 48.294 0 005.83-.498c1.585-.233 2.708-1.626 2.708-3.228V6.741c0-1.602-1.123-2.995-2.707-3.228A48.394 48.394 0 0012 3c-2.392 0-4.744.175-7.043.513C3.373 3.746 2.25 5.14 2.25 6.741v6.018z"/>
        </svg>
        <span class="contact-tab-label">Help &amp; Feedback</span>
        <span class="contact-tab-desc">Ask questions or share suggestions</span>
      </button>
    </nav>

    <!-- Form Panels -->
    <div class="contact-panels">
      <div id="propose-panel" class="contact-panel active" role="tabpanel"
           aria-labelledby="tab-propose" data-loaded="true">
        <iframe class="nettskjema-iframe"
                src="https://nettskjema.no/a/516751?embed=1"
                title="Propose Your Project"
                frameborder="0"
                width="100%"></iframe>
      </div>

      <div id="update-panel" class="contact-panel" role="tabpanel"
           aria-labelledby="tab-update" data-loaded="false"
           data-src="https://nettskjema.no/a/535098?embed=1"
           data-title="Update an existing living meta-analysis" hidden>
        <div class="contact-skeleton" aria-label="Loading form">
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--wide"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--medium"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--narrow"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--wide"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--medium"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div id="feedback-panel" class="contact-panel" role="tabpanel"
           aria-labelledby="tab-feedback" data-loaded="false"
           data-src="https://nettskjema.no/a/516802?embed=1"
           data-title="Get help or share feedback" hidden>
        <div class="contact-skeleton" aria-label="Loading form">
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--wide"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--medium"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--narrow"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--wide"></div>
          <div class="skeleton-line skeleton-line--medium"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Email fallback -->
    <div class="contact-fallback">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
           stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true" style="vertical-align: -2px; margin-right: 4px;">
        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
              d="M21.75 6.75v10.5a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25h-15a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25V6.75m19.5 0A2.25 2.25 0 0019.5 4.5h-15a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25m19.5 0v.243a2.25 2.25 0 01-1.07 1.916l-7.5 4.615a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.36 0L3.32 8.91a2.25 2.25 0 01-1.07-1.916V6.75"/>
      </svg>
      Prefer email? Reach us at
      <a href="mailto:danielqu@uio.no">danielqu@uio.no</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
/* Override body for contact page */
body {
  background: white !important;
  animation: none !important;
}
body::before, body::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.contact-page {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: var(--space-7, 40px) var(--space-4, 16px);
}

/* --- Header --- */
.contact-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: var(--space-7, 40px);
}

.contact-title {
  font-size: var(--text-3xl, 2rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0A2A5E;
  margin: 0 0 var(--space-3, 12px) 0;
}

.contact-subtitle {
  font-size: var(--text-base, 1rem);
  color: #4a5568;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* --- Tab Navigation --- */
.contact-tabs {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: var(--space-3, 12px);
  margin-bottom: var(--space-5, 24px);
}

.contact-tab {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: var(--space-4, 18px) var(--space-3, 12px);
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 2px solid #e2e6ed;
  border-radius: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: inherit;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  min-height: 44px;
}

.contact-tab:hover {
  background: #f0f4ff;
  border-color: #b8c9e0;
}

.contact-tab:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid #1E50A0;
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

.contact-tab.active {
  background: white;
  border-color: #0A2A5E;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(10, 42, 94, 0.1);
}

.contact-tab-icon {
  color: #9ca3af;
  transition: color 0.2s ease;
}

.contact-tab.active .contact-tab-icon {
  color: #0A2A5E;
}

.contact-tab-label {
  font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.875rem);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #374151;
}

.contact-tab.active .contact-tab-label {
  color: #0A2A5E;
}

.contact-tab-desc {
  font-size: var(--text-xs, 0.75rem);
  color: #9ca3af;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.contact-tab.active .contact-tab-desc {
  color: #6b7280;
}

/* --- Panels --- */
.contact-panels {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 600px;
}

.contact-panel {
  display: none;
}

.contact-panel.active {
  display: block;
}

.contact-panel[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.nettskjema-iframe {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 800px;
  height: 800px;
  border: none;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

/* --- Skeleton loading --- */
.contact-skeleton {
  padding: var(--space-7, 40px) var(--space-5, 24px);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: var(--space-4, 16px);
  min-height: 400px;
}

.skeleton-line {
  height: 16px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f2f5 25%, #e5e7eb 50%, #f0f2f5 75%);
  background-size: 200% 100%;
  animation: skeletonShimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.skeleton-line--wide   { width: 100%; }
.skeleton-line--medium { width: 70%; }
.skeleton-line--narrow { width: 40%; }

@keyframes skeletonShimmer {
  0%   { background-position: 200% 0; }
  100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .skeleton-line {
    animation: none;
    background: #e5e7eb;
  }
}

/* --- Email fallback --- */
.contact-fallback {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: var(--space-5, 24px);
  padding-top: var(--space-4, 16px);
  border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.875rem);
}

.contact-fallback a {
  color: #0A2A5E;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.contact-fallback a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* --- Responsive --- */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .contact-tabs {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .contact-tab {
    flex-direction: row;
    text-align: left;
    gap: var(--space-3, 12px);
    padding: var(--space-3, 12px) var(--space-4, 16px);
  }

  .contact-tab-icon {
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .contact-tab-desc {
    display: none;
  }
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.contact-tab');
  var panels = document.querySelectorAll('.contact-panel');

  function activateTab(formId) {
    // Deactivate all
    tabs.forEach(function(t) {
      t.classList.remove('active');
      t.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
      t.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1');
    });
    panels.forEach(function(p) {
      p.classList.remove('active');
      p.setAttribute('hidden', '');
    });

    // Activate selected
    var activeTab = document.querySelector('[data-form="' + formId + '"]');
    var activePanel = document.getElementById(formId + '-panel');

    activeTab.classList.add('active');
    activeTab.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
    activeTab.removeAttribute('tabindex');

    activePanel.classList.add('active');
    activePanel.removeAttribute('hidden');

    // Lazy-load iframe
    if (activePanel.getAttribute('data-loaded') === 'false') {
      var src = activePanel.getAttribute('data-src');
      var title = activePanel.getAttribute('data-title');
      activePanel.innerHTML = '<iframe class="nettskjema-iframe" src="' + src +
        '" title="' + title + '" frameborder="0" width="100%"></iframe>';
      activePanel.setAttribute('data-loaded', 'true');
    }
  }

  // Click handlers
  tabs.forEach(function(tab) {
    tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
      activateTab(this.getAttribute('data-form'));
    });
  });

  // Keyboard navigation (arrow keys between tabs)
  tabs.forEach(function(tab) {
    tab.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      var tabArray = Array.from(tabs);
      var current = tabArray.indexOf(this);
      var next;

      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
        next = (current + 1) % tabArray.length;
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
        next = (current - 1 + tabArray.length) % tabArray.length;
      } else {
        return;
      }

      e.preventDefault();
      tabArray[next].focus();
      activateTab(tabArray[next].getAttribute('data-form'));
    });
  });

  // Handle direct linking to feedback tab
  if (window.location.hash === '#feedback-panel') {
    activateTab('feedback');
  }
});
</script>
```
